name: Mandatory Orientation Seminar
text: All creatures must attend the seminar. Tap all creatures and put a stun counter on each creature you don't control. (Attendance is mandatory. There will be a sign-in sheet. There will be a sign-out sheet. They will not match.)
flavorText: Hour one: housekeeping. Hour two: housekeeping, continued. Hour three: a video from 1987.
